goal_results.evidence: manual_commit_hooks.go: ttyConfirmResult int type defined with iota enum (ttyConfirmYes, ttyConfirmNo, ttyConfirmAlways). askConfirmTTY signature changed from 'bool' return to 'ttyConfirmResult'. Switch/case handles 'a'/'always' returning ttyConfirmAlways. Verified by test gate G4 (5/5 checks pass).

manual_commit_hooks.go: saveCommitLinkingAlways function added — loads existing local settings via settings.LoadFromFile, sets local.CommitLinking = settings.CommitLinkingAlways, saves via settings.SaveLocal. Called from PrepareCommitMsg when result == ttyConfirmAlways (line ~414-421). Verified by test gate G5 (4/4 checks pass).

setup.go: (a) isFirstSetup detection removed in both runEnableInteractive and setupAgentHooksNonInteractive, along with commit_linking initialization branching. (b) migrateProjectSettings function entirely removed (lines 723-750 equivalent). (c) Duplicated save blocks replaced with saveSettings closure at line ~208. Verified by test gates G2 (PASS) and G3 (closure_helper=True, called_twice=True, struct_copy_anti=False).

config.go: CommitLinkingAlways and CommitLinkingPrompt constant aliases removed (diff shows deletion of lines 'CommitLinkingAlways = settings.CommitLinkingAlways' and 'CommitLinkingPrompt = settings.CommitLinkingPrompt'). Verified by test gate G1 PASS.

manual_commit_hooks.go: Prompt now shows '[Y]es / [n]o / [a]lways (remember my choice): ' (or '[y]es / [N]o / [a]lways (remember my choice): ' when defaultYes=false), clearly explaining what 'a' means. Header and detail lines displayed with indentation for better formatting. Verified by test gate G4 hint check.

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. test.sh returns reward 1.0 with all gates passing (G1-G5 + P2P). The patch cleanly implements the three-way confirm type, save-always helper, setup.go simplification, config.go cleanup, and TUI prompt improvements. Score = 0.28+0.28+0.28+0.08+0.08 = 1.00.
